mapper.sql: id, project_id, status, progress, current_stage, error_message, scan_mode, base_commit_sha, target_commit_sha, merge_base_sha, change_summary, created_at, completed_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_task (id, project_id, status, progress, current_stage, error_message, scan_mode, base_commit_sha, target_commit_sha, merge_base_sha, change_summary, created_at, completed_at, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{currentStage}, #{errorMessage}, #{scanMode}, #{baseCommitSha}, #{targetCommitSha}, #{mergeBaseSha}, #{changeSummary}, #{createdAt}, #{completedAt}, #{version})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM audit_task ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_task SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, change_summary = #{changeSummary}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
